plan.annotation: The 16:9 media region is an explicit replacement-required placeholder: no product bitmap was supplied, so no interface is simulated. Numbered callouts are positioned to bind to the corresponding controls the moment authentic evidence replaces the placeholder.

operations.label: 16:9 media region
operations.value: Large central placeholder marked 'Screenshot replacement required — no bitmap supplied'; no fabricated UI rendered inside.

operations.label: Three numbered callouts
operations.value: 1) Model selection is visible · 2) Validation status is visible · 3) Trace inspection is available — editable callouts anchored around the media region.

operations.label: Missing-evidence disclosure
operations.value: Placeholder caption states that the product screenshot is absent and must be replaced with a verified capture before distribution.

plan.pptxFallback: In PowerPoint the 16:9 placeholder and the three numbered callouts export as grouped-editable shapes, so teams can swap in a real screenshot and re-anchor callouts without rebuilding the slide; no product image is manufactured at any point.

sourceLabels.label: Evidence availability: no product screenshot bitmap included; verified surfaces are model selection, validation status, and the Trace inspector.

plan.takeaway: Three verified controls — model selection, validation status, and the Trace inspector — anchor the reviewable-generation story once the real screenshot is dropped in.
plan.title: NodeSlide Reviewable Generation: Product Proof
